description: Sealing machine could be used in many kinds of products such as Foods, Stationery, Electronics, Hardware tools, Daily Necessities, etc., which require plastic to pack and seal. Available film: LLDPE, PVC, OPP, PP and POF.
features: Sealing control is used by transient heating, which is quickly seal, beautiful, and saving electricity.
Sealing time and temperature can be changed which is decided by the thickness of film.
Saving Electricity and resources. Just need one person to operate.
Easy operating and maintenance.

description: Sealing machine could be used in many kinds of products such as Foods, Stationery, Electronics, Hardware tools, Daily Necessities, etc., which require plastic to pack and seal. Available film: LLDPE, PVC, OPP, PP and POF. Option: Cutting Knife.
features: Impulse sealer is using electronic control which is easy to operate.
Option: Cutting Knife.
Powder paint.
Easy operating and maintenance.

description: Sealing machine could be used in many kinds of products such as Foods, Stationery, Electronics, Hardware tools, Daily Necessities, etc., which require shrinking and packing. Available film: LLDPE, PVC, OPP, PP and POF.
features: Saving Electricity and resources. Just need one person to operate.

description: For foods: extends storage date, prevents pollution, keeps food fresh, antiseptic, moisture-proof, and dust-proof. For electronics: prevents corrosion, moisture, and dust.
features: Extends storage date of food and prevents pollution.
Prevents electronic parts from corrosion, moisture, and dust.
Easy operating, use friendly.
High-quality electric parts and vacuum pump—low failure rate.
Electronic circuit is stable, moisture-proof, low failure rate, and easy to maintain.

description: Suitable for OPP, CPP, KOP, PET, Aluminum Foil & Back Laminated Paper. For packing instant noodles, biscuits, ice cream, chewing-gum, chocolate, bread, and various solid products.
features: Easy to adjust and operate with any different products.
Can pack various sizes of solid articles; adjustable and changeable into various packing sizes.
Package position and size conveniently adjusted from switch on control panel.
Contacting surfaces with packing articles made of stainless steel for sanitary purpose.
High-quality electric parts, long lasting, low failure rate.
Easy maintain and user friendly.

description: Used for export goods, foods, drinks, cartons, paints, plastics, glasses, and electrical parts that need bundling in one package. Prevents damage during delivery and keeps goods clean.
features: Stretch film carriage equipped with hinged drive for smooth vertical movement—speed adjustable.
Turntable equipped with hinged drive for stable turning during pallet loading—speed adjustable.
Motor speed controlled by inverter for steady, smooth running.
Two-dent design at bottom of turntable allows easy forklift movement.
Photoelectric cell reads pallet height automatically—easy operating.
Pre-stretch System optional to save film material.
